name: vLLM — Qwen2.5 0.5B Instruct (local)
description: Local OpenAI-compatible LLM inference server (vLLM) serving the small Qwen/Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct model. On startup vLLM downloads the model from the Hugging Face Hub, then serves it locally on port 8000 (e.g. POST /v1/chat/completions). The model is fixed by the operator; the consumer only needs a GPU-enabled environment. Set HF_TOKEN only if you later switch to a gated model.

requiredResources.description: CUDA-capable GPU (>= 6 GB VRAM is plenty for this 0.5B model)
